form.formComment: Returns from a 37-day let-up. Most recently 8th of 12 at this track on March 4 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Quite Possible carrying 54kg at $9.80. The start before that ran on from midfield; 3rd of 12 at this track on February 3 over 1400m, head behind Naatu with 54kg at $7.40. Strong each-way hope with the assistance of the inside alley.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of three-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign 11th of 14 at this track January 4 over 1500m, 12 len behind Fereydun with 51kg at $54.60. form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start came from midfield and won by 0.8 len at Urawa March 17 over 1500m defeating Kanetoshi Shukin carrying 56kg at $7.80. The race before that gave a sight but was run down late 2nd of 12 at Urawa on February 28 over 2000m, 0.5 len behind Miraie Hosho with 56kg at $5.30. Big chance again now that the penny has dropped.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resumes off a 38 day letup. Second-up won by 1.5 len at this track March 3 over 1400m defeating Bel Air King carrying 55kg at $15.80. Impressive win last start and is in the mix again.
